title: nie-wasm: wasm-bindgen public API exports
description:
## What
Implement the JavaScript-facing public API in `wasm/src/api.rs` (and re-export from `wasm/src/lib.rs`) using #[wasm_bindgen]. These are the functions the browser HTML/JS will call.

## Algorithm
1. Add console_error_panic_hook initialization to the init() function (already in lib.rs skeleton).
2. Implement free functions in wasm/src/api.rs (all tagged #[wasm_bindgen]):
   a. generate_identity() -> String:
      - Call Identity::generate()
      - Return base64(identity.to_secret_bytes_64()) as String
      - NEVER return the raw bytes or expose Identity struct to JS
   b. pub_id_from_secret(secret_b64: &str) -> Result<String, JsValue>:
      - base64-decode secret_b64 to [u8; 64]
      - Identity::from_secret_bytes(&bytes)
      - Return identity.pub_id().0
   c. save_identity(secret_b64: &str) -> Promise: delegates to storage::save_identity()
   d. load_identity() -> Promise: delegates to storage::load_identity(), returns base64 string or null
3. Implement #[wasm_bindgen] NieClient struct in wasm/src/api.rs:
   - Wraps an Rc<RefCell<Option<client::NieRelayClient>>>
   - #[wasm_bindgen(constructor)] pub fn new() -> NieClient
   - pub fn connect(&self, relay_url: &str, secret_b64: &str) -> Promise:
     * decode secret, create Identity, call NieRelayClient::connect
     * Returns Promise resolving to pub_id string
   - pub fn send_message(&self, text: &str) -> Promise: delegates to client
   - pub fn set_nickname(&self, nick: &str) -> Promise: delegates to client
   - pub fn on_event(&self, callback: &js_sys::Function): register JS callback on client
   - pub fn get_online_users(&self) -> String: delegates to client, returns JSON array string
   - pub fn disconnect(&self) -> Promise: calls transport.close()
4. All Promise returns use future_to_promise(async { ... })
5. Errors from Rust become JsValue (string message) → JS catches them as exceptions
6. Add #[wasm_bindgen(start)] to call init() on WASM module load

## Defensive programming
- generate_identity() returns only the base64-encoded secret; never returns raw [u8; 64] typed array
  (base64 string is still sensitive but at least it's a common opaque format)
- pub_id_from_secret validates length == 64 after decode; returns Err(JsValue) on mismatch
- NieClient methods guard against disconnected state: return Err if client is None
- Never include key bytes in error messages
- All #[wasm_bindgen] methods return Result<T, JsValue> where Err becomes a thrown JS exception

## Agent team
Researcher: read wasm-bindgen docs for Promise pattern (future_to_promise); read wasm/src/client.rs and storage.rs interfaces.
Implementer: write wasm/src/api.rs and update wasm/src/lib.rs.

## Tests
- cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm exits 0
- wasm-pack build --target web wasm/ succeeds (produces pkg/ directory)
- TypeScript declarations in pkg/nie_wasm.d.ts contain: NieClient class, generate_identity fn
acceptance_criteria: wasm-pack build --target web wasm/ succeeds; NieClient exported with connect/send_message/on_event/disconnect; generate_identity exported; no key bytes in any exported API signatures
close_reason: wasm-bindgen public API exports implemented; cargo check and clippy --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -D warnings both pass
